title: PUR 2025
description: PUR 2025 Pack is the official recommend pack to play on PUR. Hosted by HorizonBlocks
body:
✨ Overview

PUR 2025 (Pure, Uncluttered, Refined) is a modern and lightweight modpack that enhances Minecraft’s visual quality, performance, and usability — without compromising the original vanilla feeling.
Built for stability, elegance, and smooth gameplay, PUR 2025 is the perfect foundation for builders, survival players, and explorers who want clarity, performance, and style.

⚡ Performance & Graphics

Sodium, Lithium, ImmediatelyFast – Core optimization for maximum FPS

Iris Shaders – Full shader support with beautiful lighting

Distant Horizons – Render extreme view distances smoothly

EntityCulling, MoreCulling, GammaUtils – Smarter rendering and lighting for smoother gameplay

Zoomify & Xaero’s Minimap/WorldMap – Keep your world in focus and under control

🧩 Quality of Life

ModMenu & Cloth Config – Manage mods easily in-game

Inventory Management & ShulkerBox Tooltip – Smooth storage and crafting workflow

ChatCalc, Dynamic Crosshair, Visuality – Subtle, immersive interface improvements

Locator Heads & Skinlayers3D – Add personality and detail to your world

🏞️ Atmosphere & Style

Capes, ArmorHUDs & Skin Tweaks – Refined visual customization

BundlesBeyond & Here’n’There – Small additions that enrich the vanilla experience

No complex tech or magic mods – Keep the world clean, modern, and pure

💡 Philosophy

“Pure Minecraft — just better.”

PUR 2025 is designed for players who want:

a clean and fast experience,

stunning visuals through shaders and lighting,

quality-of-life upgrades that feel native to Minecraft,

and a setup that stays stable and future-proof for 2025 and beyond.

🧱 Final Words

A modern, stylish, and performance-focused modpack for 2025 —
Fast. Beautiful. Pure.
Perfect for builders, survivalists, and explorers alike.
